_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Create and/or maintain governance structure for oversight and accountability of AI solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI governance structures, including model risk management, AI lifecycle oversight, accountability assignment, and the organizational conditions that enable responsible AI deployment at scale.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-002 (AG, cosine: 0.761), AG-A-001 (AG, cosine: 0.750).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.542). Shared vocabulary: [accountability, ai, governance, oversight]. DCWF-only terms [create, maintain, solutions, structure] vs WIDAI-only terms [assignment, conditions, deployment, enable, knowledge, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.900, R=0.885). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Create and/or maintain governance structure for oversight and accountability of" and "Knowledge of AI governance structures, including model risk management, AI lifec" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.807 > STS 0.542 (gap +0.264). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [accountability, ai, governance, oversight] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.7%. Shared tokens: [accountability, ai, governance, oversight]. DCWF-only: [create, maintain, solutions, structure]. WIDAI-only: [assignment, conditions, deployment, enable, knowledge, lifecycle].

signals.detail: STS 0.542 barely clears classification threshold for Equal. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.264 with low STS 0.542. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
